history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed after Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to type mismatches and method signature changes in custom controllers/services, likely caused by Spring Batch 5.x API changes and missing plugin upgrades for Java 17.
history.qwen_rationale: Added upgrade_plugins_for_java17 to ensure compiler and related plugins are compatible with JDK 17 before the Spring Boot 3 migration. Added SpringBoot3BestPractices to apply post-migration fixes that may resolve API alignment issues. Restricted java17_transforms to only allowed recipes to prevent recipe-not-found errors. The incremental plugin and best-practices steps should stabilize the build before proceeding to Java 21.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed during Spring Boot 3.3 migration due to type mismatches (LocalDateTime vs Date) and method signature changes in custom Spring Batch controllers/services.
history.qwen_rationale: Reverting to the default chain template structure, replacing upgrade_build_to_java17 with UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 as recommended for SB2->SB3 transitions, and removing the non-standard SpringBoot3BestPractices step to reduce noise. The full set of allowed Java 17/21 transform recipes is restored to ensure proper JDK compatibility fixes are applied.

history.qwen_observation: Compilation failed during Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade due to Spring Batch 5 API changes (LocalDateTime/Date type mismatch and missing JobRepository/PlatformTransactionManager parameters in user code).
history.qwen_rationale: Downgrading the Spring Boot target to 3.2 (which uses Spring Batch 5.0.x instead of 5.1.x) may reduce breaking API changes and allow the build to pass. The chain follows the recommended SB 2.x -> 3.x migration path, replacing the direct 3.3 jump with 3.2 to minimize regression risk while still satisfying Java 21 compatibility requirements.

history.qwen_observation: Build failed at upgrade_spring_boot_3_2 due to Spring Batch API signature changes and LocalDateTime/Date type mismatches introduced by Spring Boot 3 / Hibernate 6 migration.
history.qwen_rationale: Switching to UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 provides a more comprehensive set of migration recipes that better handle Spring Batch 5 and Spring Data/Hibernate 6 API changes. Adding SpringBoot3BestPractices further aligns the codebase with SB3 expectations. The stepwise approach (2.3 -> 2.7 -> 3.3) minimizes regression risk while the meta-recipe internally composes the Java 17 build upgrade.

history.qwen_observation: Recipe validation failed because 'org.openrewrite.java.spring.boot3.SpringBoot3BestPractices' does not exist in the active OpenRewrite plugin version.
history.qwen_rationale: Removing the non-existent SpringBoot3BestPractices recipe from the upgrade_spring_boot_3_3 step resolves the immediate validation error. The chain otherwise follows the empirically validated SB2→SB3→JDK21 migration path, stepping through SB 2.7 under JDK 11 before crossing to SB 3.3 under JDK 17, then proceeding to JDK 21.
